holdings.infoBox: SOXS is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 62.76%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 61.51%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 30.84%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 29.91%, and Cash at 0.17%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bear 3X ETF (SOXS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Semiconductor index. The fund provides daily 3x leveraged inverse exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 30 US-listed semiconductor companies. SOXS was launched on Mar 11, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.
